metadata.description: Criar config/nginx.conf com HTTP server na porta 8080 servindo o diretório /tftpboot com autoindex habilitado e mime types corretos para servir binários PXE.
metadata.goal: nginx HTTP server na porta 8080 para servir assets PXE (vmlinuz, initrd, ipxe scripts, kickstart)
acceptanceCriteria: mime types incluem application/octet-stream para binários

summary: Created config/nginx.conf with HTTP server on port 8080 serving /tftpboot with autoindex, sendfile, and correct MIME types for PXE binaries (application/octet-stream). All acceptance criteria verified via test script.
